query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime city intersection with two pedestrians walking toward a large building featuring illuminated arched windows and multiple commercial signs. Tall street lamps line the roadway, and several cars are visible on the street. A multi-story parking garage stands on the right, while traffic signals, concrete bollards, and a fire hydrant occupy the foreground. An American flag hangs near a corner entrance of the central building.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime urban intersection suffused with an unhealthy yellow-orange sodium vapor cast, where two pedestrians walk toward a large building complex with illuminated arched windows and storefront signage. Moving vehicles appear as elongated motion blurs from long-exposure capture, while stationary street lamps and traffic signals punctuate the scene. A multi-story parking garage stands on the right, and concrete bollards line the wide pedestrian plaza in the foreground.
